name: Family & Friends
description: Warm, thoughtful questions and mini-missions about family, friendship and teamwork.

stations.title: Bonds
stations.questionText: What do we call the people you are related to by blood or marriage?

stations.title: Trust
stations.questionText: Name one quality that makes someone a GOOD friend. (any reasonable answer)
stations.correctAnswer: honest, honesty, kind, kindness, loyal, loyalty, caring, trust, trustworthy, funny, supportive, helpful, respect

stations.title: Teamwork
stations.questionText: Complete the saying: 'Two heads are better than ___.'

stations.title: Family tree
stations.questionText: What do you call your parent's brother?

stations.title: Sharing
stations.questionText: If a friend is sad, name one thing you can do to help them feel better.
stations.correctAnswer: listen, talk, hug, help, comfort, support, be there, cheer, smile, play

stations.title: Mission: thanks
stations.questionText: MISSION: Take a group photo showing a 'thank you' gesture to someone in your family.

stations.title: Generations
stations.questionText: What do you call your mother's mother?

stations.title: Conflict
stations.questionText: What is a good first step when two friends have an argument?
stations.correctAnswer: talk, apologize, listen, calm, communicate, sorry, compromise

stations.title: Mission: team
stations.questionText: MISSION: Form a human pyramid or a group hug and take a photo!

stations.title: Values
stations.questionText: Finish the sentence: 'A friend in need is a friend ___.'
